changes.before: Harness rings stayed almost silent; Thalassian tack was built for that.
changes.after: Harness rings stayed quiet; Thalassian tack was built for that.

changes.before: Armed people riding hard in one direction always meant the trouble was ahead.
changes.after: He watched their speed, their faces, and the bow on Sylvanas's back, measuring how near the trouble was to his own field.

changes.before: A longer one meant fear dressed as deliberation.
changes.after: The pause lasted just long enough for her to picture him somewhere far from her with the whole weight of Dalaran at his back and none of it moving quickly enough.

changes.before: There it was, stripped of manners at last.
There it was, stripped of manners at last.

Her thoughts were already ordering themselves against the Stratholme map she carried from old lessons and newer reports: markets, bakers, warehouse lanes, the service roads that fed the city its grain.
changes.after: She set her thoughts against the Stratholme map she carried from old lessons and newer reports: markets, bakers, warehouse lanes, the service roads that fed the city its grain.

changes.before: She needed something else from it.
Doors still unlocked because no one yet believed they were the hinges of a massacre.
changes.after: Doors still unlocked because no one yet believed the grain had turned those doors dangerous.
